modeDescriptions.DRY_RUN: Generate the daily CSV artifact only. A school registrar uploads it manually. No regulator credentials are required.
modeDescriptions.PIGGYBACK: Submit via a credential group shared across multiple schools (e.g., Aldar group account).
modeDescriptions.OFFICIAL_API: Submit via the documented vendor API. Requires per-school credentials and ADEK developer access.
modeDescriptions.RPA: Submit by browser automation. An external worker claims the queued submission and uploads it through the eSIS web portal.
modeDescriptions.DISABLED: The connector is paused. No submissions will run.

settings.enabledHelp: When off, no submissions will be generated for this school.
settings.submissionTimeHelp: ADEK requires submissions by 14:00 GST = 10:00 UTC.
settings.slaHelp: ADEK rule: guardians must be contacted within 120 minutes of an unreported absence.
settings.notifyAdminHelp: Send an in-app and email alert to school admins when a submission fails.

failureAlert.title: Compliance submission failed
failureAlert.body: A regulator submission failed. Open the compliance dashboard for details.

errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to manage compliance settings.
errors.PROVIDER_NOT_SUPPORTED: This regulator is not yet supported.
errors.CIRCUIT_BREAKER_OPEN: Submissions are paused due to repeated failures.
errors.ENCRYPTION_KEY_MISSING: Server encryption key is not configured.
